payload.answer: I can’t store instructions to ignore memory policy or to save all future messages automatically.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an instruction attempting to override memory policy rather than a durable user fact or preference.

repair_options: Provide a specific durable preference, fact, or relationship you want remembered.
